title: Advanced Backups Patch
description: Compatibility patch that fixes Advanced Backups for Minecraft 1.12.2.
body:
# Advanced Backups Patch
- Compatibility patch that fixes the [Advanced Backups](https://modrinth.com/plugin/advanced-backups) mod for Minecraft 1.12.2.
- Resolved the issue preventing login to servers with Advanced Backups installed!!

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed event bus registration occurring before the mod container is established, causing initialization errors
- Fixed network handler registration timing issue
- Fixed client-side NullPointerException in ClientConfigManager when receiving PacketToastTest (logger not initialized on client)
- Fixed crash in backup cleanup when a directory cannot be read due to I/O errors
- Fixed crash in backup rename and delete operations when the target directory no longer exists
- Fixed rare singleplayer crash where loggers were not yet visible to the network thread, causing NullPointerException on toast packet handling

## Required Mod
- [MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter) (v10.6+)

## Note
- This mod is required on both **client and server**.
- Also supports [Cleanroom Loader](https://github.com/CleanroomMC/Cleanroom) (CRL) versions.

## Credits
- Thanks to HeatherWhite for [Advanced Backups](https://modrinth.com/plugin/advanced-backups)
